name: PCHEM
summary: PCHEM (PETRONAS Chemicals Group Bhd) is a Malaysia-based integrated chemicals producer. The company manufactures and markets a wide range of chemical products, including olefins, polymers, fertilizers, methanol, and other basic chemicals and derivatives. PCHEM is a subsidiary of Petroliam Nasional Berhad (PETRONAS) and is headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
